prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 合肥工业大 学为211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名主榜约第80名（2026年），属全国中上游水平；宣城校区与本部同属一个办学体系，共享211/双一流品牌效应；该校近年声誉偏负面：2025年高考周期内出现"热门专业投档线暴跌"舆情，2026年周期内又发生"学术不端"事件，可能对部分考生报考意愿产生一定抑制。抖音热度排名第77 位，评价为"一般"，短视频平台曝光量中等偏低；合肥工业大学（主校）在第五轮学科评估中，管理科学与工程获评A级，为该校最强学科。宣城校区在新疆招 生的物流管理（数智物流）专业正对应管理科学与工程一级学科，具备学科支撑。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 物流管理/管理科学与工程类专业社会热度整体平稳，无明显升温或降 温信号。新疆2026年高考考生总数约23.8万人，按2025年理科占比68.6%估算，2026年理科考生约16.3万人，较2025年理科5.25万人大幅增长约210%，竞争环境 显著加剧。；合肥工业大学（宣城校区）位于安徽省宣城市，距新疆 较远，属于跨省招生。该校在新疆仅投放1个招生名额，属于小规模招生，位次波动受个别考生填报行为影响较大。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次6595名、2026年招生计 划持平、新疆理科考生总数大幅增长（竞争加剧）以及学校声誉偏负面等因素，预计2026年录取位次将较2025年后移。预测最低录取位次约6795名，波动区间6295-7295名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: Hefei University of Technology (Xuancheng Campus) has only recorded admissions in Xinjiang Uygur Autonomous Region for science in 2025, with the lowest admission rank approximately 6595. Since there is no enrollment data for previous years, long-term trends cannot be determined, and the 2025 rank serves as the sole baseline reference. The university's science enrollment plan in Xinjiang was 1 person in 2025 and remains 1 person in 2026, with no changes in enrollment scale, thus no impact from expansion or contraction.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Hefei University of Technology is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university, ranking approximately 80th in the main list of the Soft Science China University Rankings (2026), placing it at the mid-to-upper level nationally. The Xuancheng Campus shares the same educational system as the main campus, benefiting from the 211/Double First-Class brand effect. However, the university's reputation has been somewhat negative recently: during the 2025 college entrance examination cycle, there was public opinion about a 'sharp drop in admission scores for popular majors,' and during the 2026 cycle, an 'academic misconduct' incident occurred, which may suppress some candidates' willingness to apply. Douyin popularity ranks 77th, with a rating of 'average,' indicating moderately low exposure on short video platforms. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Hefei University of Technology (main campus) received an A grade for Management Science and Engineering, its strongest discipline. The Logistics Management (Digital Intelligence Logistics) major recruited by the Xuancheng Campus in Xinjiang corresponds to the first-level discipline of Management Science and Engineering, providing disciplinary support.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The overall social popularity of Logistics Management/Management Science and Engineering majors is stable, with no obvious signs of heating up or cooling down. In 2026, the total number of college entrance examination candidates in Xinjiang is approximately 238,000. Based on the 2025 science proportion of 68.6%, it is estimated that there will be about 163,000 science candidates in 2026, a significant increase of approximately 210% compared to 52,500 science candidates in 2025, indicating a markedly intensified competitive environment. Hefei University of Technology (Xuancheng Campus) is located in Xuancheng City, Anhui Province, far from Xinjiang, making it a cross-provincial enrollment. The university only offers 1 enrollment slot in Xinjiang, which is a small-scale enrollment, and rank fluctuations are greatly affected by individual candidate application behaviors.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline rank of 6595, the unchanged 2026 enrollment plan, the significant increase in the total number of science candidates in Xinjiang (intensified competition), and the somewhat negative university reputation, it is expected that the 2026 admission rank will shift backward compared to 2025. The predicted minimum admission rank is approximately 6795, with a fluctuation range of 6295-7295.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Logistics Management (Digital Intelligence Logistics)
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Hefei University of Technology (Xuancheng Campus) only recruits one major, Logistics Management (Digital Intelligence Logistics), for science in Xinjiang, with only 1 slot, making it a small-scale enrollment. This major relies on the A-level discipline of Management Science and Engineering at Hefei University of Technology, which has strong disciplinary strength. Candidates with ranks within the predicted range of 6295-7295 can attempt to apply. Those with ranks better than the lower limit (<6295) have a higher probability of admission, while those near the upper limit (>7295) face greater risk. Since there is only one major, there is no tiered strategy of 'rush, stabilize, protect.' It is recommended that candidates make a comprehensive judgment based on their own rank and the university's sole historical baseline rank.
